note: Initialized VibeGeometry with Epiphany-style persistence surfaces adapted to Blender 5.0+ geometry-node scene generation.

Geometry Script add-on is installed under Blender 5.1 and imports headlessly. A trivial cube node group built successfully in Blender 5.1.1; the documented grid().mesh_to_points() chain failed with NoneType callable, so Geometry Script should be treated as promising but each idiom must be smoke-tested against the installed Blender/add-on pair.

Local Geometry Script 5.1 generated docs are the authoritative node-signature source for this workspace. The prior grid().mesh_to_points() probe failed because grid() returns a result object with mesh and uv_map; the valid chain is grid(...).mesh.mesh_to_points(...).

Public Geometry Nodes learning material is mostly screenshots, videos, and downloadable .blend files. VibeGeometry should build durable Geometry Script knowledge by inspecting source .blend node groups, mapping one graph at a time in prose, then recreating and smoke-testing with local Geometry Script 5.1 signatures.

Completed first Geometry Nodes translation corpus entry: inspected Shriinivas/cartesian.blend NodeGroup.001, mapped its curve/vector field flow, recreated it as examples/geometry_script/shriinivas_cartesian_helper.py, and smoke-tested generation/save/reinspection in Blender 5.1.1. Generated node groups need fake users or real users before saving.

Verified translated Shriinivas cartesian helper behavior against source NodeGroup.001 by wrapping both helpers as Curve+Vector -> Set Position -> Curve to Mesh and comparing evaluated mesh vertices. Test used Count=25, Start=(-0.45,0,0), End=(0.45,0,0), r=0.6, Value=1.25; source and translation both produced 200 vertices with max delta 0.0.

Translated and verified all four inspected Shriinivas/cartesian.blend graph groups: helper, line, parabola, and circle. Verification compares evaluated meshes in Blender 5.1.1; helper/line/parabola match direct vertex order with max delta 0.0, circle matches sorted vertex set with max sorted delta 0.0.

Reverted direct AppData Geometry Script surgery. Cloned upstream Geometry Script into ignored external/geometry-script, committed local branch vibegeometry/blender-5-nested-tree-groups with nested @tree group fix, stored patch under patches/geometry-script, and added setup_geometry_script_clone.ps1 plus loader so VibeGeometry uses the repo-local patched clone.

Translated and verified Shriinivas/piechart.blend small graph family: NodeGroup -> VG Pie Segment and Pie Chart -> VG Pie Chart. Segment and chart evaluated mesh comparisons both passed in Blender 5.1.1 with sorted max vertex delta 0.0. Doctrine added: reusable groups can pass invisible scalar state such as End angle alongside visible geometry.

Translated and verified Shriinivas/fieldvalue.blend Digit At scalar helper as VG Digit At. Verification wraps source and translation by driving Mesh Line.Count and matches four number/position cases, including zero output. Doctrine added: value-only node groups need geometry-producing verification harnesses.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Create Decimal -> VG Create Decimal. Verified against source by comparing evaluated dot geometry: both source and translation produce 32 vertices with sorted max vertex delta 0.0. Doctrine added: tiny glyph marks such as decimal points should be isolated as named reusable parts when they carry stable display intent.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Create Segment -> VG Create Segment. Verified horizontal and vertical segment cases against source with 6 vertices each and sorted max vertex delta 0.0. Doctrine added: field masks can act as chisels over regular seed meshes, gating vertex offsets by local position conditions.

Created and pushed GameCult/VibeGeometry remote. Forked Geometry Script to GameCult/geometry-script, pushed branch vibegeometry/blender-5-nested-tree-groups, and opened upstream PR https://github.com/carson-katri/geometry-script/pull/69 for the nested @tree group reference fix.

Pruned inherited upstream-only branches gh-pages and nodes_to_script from GameCult/geometry-script. The fork branch surface is intentionally main plus vibegeometry/blender-5-nested-tree-groups while upstream may retain its own historical branch soup.

Upstream Geometry Script nodes_to_script branch is a real node-tree-to-script prototype from 2023-03-01. It adds operators/convert_tree.py, which walks a node tree and emits a @tree script text datablock, but it predates Blender 4 interface migration and later main-branch fixes, so VibeGeometry should treat it as a translation assistant candidate to port/test rather than a current drop-in dependency.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Seven Segments -> VG Seven Segments. Verified against source with 74 vertices and sorted max vertex delta 0.0 in Blender 5.1.1. Doctrine added: chassis groups compose tested parts into a joined assembly while preserving part intent in script.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Delete Segments -> VG Delete Segments. Verified source and translation across 195 digit/segment-position cases with zero mismatches by driving the boolean output into a Mesh Line count harness. Doctrine added: dense boolean node regions often encode lookup tables and should be translated into named clauses plus full-grid verification.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Next Digit -> VG Next Digit. Verified four branch cases spanning both sides of Max Precision by driving Result into Mesh Line.Count; all source and translated counts matched.

Full fieldvalue Field Value graph is a 176-node composition with menu switches, capture attributes across domains, sample-index reads, instancing, transforms, delete geometry, and material assignment. Manual one-pass translation would be high-risk; next action should test or port upstream Geometry Script nodes_to_script as a generated first-draft tool before attempting the full graph.

Reframed procedural doctrine as a spatial reasoning playbook rather than abstraction glossary. Each doctrine pattern should describe the visual cue, mental move, Geometry Script code shape, and verification cue so metaphors help an agent choose tools while reasoning about form.

Audited procedural doctrine snippets against the verified Geometry Script translations and removed conceptual shorthand. Doctrine snippets should use the same explicit Geometry Script node-call style as the scripts that passed Blender verification, with excerpts clearly behaving as excerpts rather than pseudocode.

Ported upstream Geometry Script nodes_to_script prototype onto GameCult fork branch vibegeometry/blender-5-nodes-to-script. Added callable convert_node_tree(tree), UI operator registration, patch persistence, and a Blender smoke harness. In Blender 5.1.1 the converter emits compiling draft scripts for Create Decimal, Digit At, Next Digit, Seven Segments, Delete Segments, and the 176-node Field Value group; generated output is a bootstrap draft requiring cleanup and behavioral verification.

nodes_to_script output is evidence and scaffolding, not style guidance. Use it to recover wiring/defaults/socket order and hidden graph structure, then rewrite into doctrine-quality Geometry Script with spatial names, intentional decomposition, and behavioral verification.

Updated VibeGeometry priors: Python is the authoring and orchestration layer, Geometry Script is the inspectable node-graph emission surface, bpy handles Blender scene/render/evaluation machinery, and external Python tools handle inspection, converter drafts, verification, docs, and corpus evidence. Do not reason as if the Geometry Script DSL is the whole toolchain.
